slide1.title: Technology That Works For You
slide1.subtitle: IT operations, network building, custom development – in the background, efficiently. Trust us with your infrastructure and focus on your real work.

slide2.title: IT and Security Technology From One Hand
slide2.subtitle: SIRONIC provides professional IT solutions complemented by SIRO-VÉD security technology services – camera systems, alarm systems, and fire detection.

slide3.title: Smart Forms. Intelligent Issue Reporting. Partner Portal.
slide3.subtitle: Fill in our smart needs assessment questionnaire and receive an approximate operations price right away. Contract clients have online access to the partner portal.

services.sectionSubtitle: Comprehensive IT and technology solutions for small and medium businesses

itOps.title: IT Operations and Maintenance
itOps.subtitle: Invisible, efficient background support
itOps.description: We operate your company's entire IT infrastructure remotely. No unnecessary on-site visits, no unexpected surprises – just continuous, reliable operation in the background.
points: From micro-businesses to small manufacturing companies
Both contract-based and ad hoc work available
Monthly fee based on infrastructure size
Additional cost only for interventions or development

network.title: Network Building and Development
network.subtitle: Stable, secure network infrastructure
network.description: We plan, build, and modernize your company's network infrastructure. Whether it's a new installation or expanding an existing network.
points: New installations and existing network upgrades
Available for businesses and private clients

nis2.title: NIS2-Compatible IT Systems
nis2.subtitle: Audit preparation and ongoing operational cooperation
nis2.description: Compliance with NIS2 directive obligations is a complex task. SIRONIC, together with its trusted consulting partner, plans, implements, and operates IT systems that meet the requirements.
points: Together with a trusted consulting partner

webDev.title: Website and System Development
webDev.subtitle: Without templates, tailored to your needs
webDev.description: We don't rely on template-based CMS platforms. Every project is designed and developed according to the client's brand, style, and workflow requirements – from simple presentation sites to complex internal business systems.
points: Internal business systems and web-based applications

security.title: Security Technology (SIRO-VÉD)
security.subtitle: Cameras, alarms, fire detection
security.description: Security technology services are provided under the SIRO-VÉD brand. IP and analog camera systems, alarm systems, and soon built-in fire detection solutions.

repair.title: Service and Repair
repair.subtitle: Hardware and software – laptops, PCs
repair.description: SIRONIC's roots are in service and repair work. When needed, we handle laptop and PC repair, hardware and software troubleshooting.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: What business owners ask most often

items.q: How does remote IT operations work in practice?
items.a: Using modern technologies – secure remote access tools – we continuously monitor, maintain, and intervene. Most tasks can be performed without an on-site visit, so you don't need to deal with the daily operation of your IT systems.

items.q: What size businesses do you work with?
items.a: We primarily provide IT operations services for micro-businesses up to smaller manufacturing companies. Exact pricing depends on infrastructure size, which our smart needs assessment questionnaire helps determine.

items.q: What if I only need one-time help, not a long-term contract?
items.a: We gladly accept one-time requests. Development, maintenance, or troubleshooting tasks can be performed without a contract.

items.q: Does the smart needs assessment give a real price quote?
items.a: After completing the questionnaire, you'll receive an approximate operations fee estimate. This is not a final offer, but provides a good starting point for discussions.

items.q: What's the difference between SIRONIC and SIRO-VÉD?
items.a: SIRONIC is the main brand for IT and technology services. SIRO-VÉD is the separate online brand for security technology services (camera systems, alarms, fire detection) with its own website at siroved.hu.

items.q: How do you help with NIS2 compliance?
items.a: Together with our trusted consulting partner, we plan and implement the IT system expected by the NIS2 directive, prepare you for the audit, and provide ongoing operational cooperation after the audit.

items.q: Do you build custom websites or CMS-based ones (e.g. WordPress)?
items.a: We exclusively build custom-developed solutions. We don't use template-based CMS platforms – every project is tailored to the client's needs and branding, from design to backend.

items.q: How quickly can I get in touch and start a project?
items.a: After filling in the smart contact or needs assessment form, we typically respond within 1 business day. For urgent matters, we provide a separate one-time incident report form.
